blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,410 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
